text.title: Performance Testing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Performance Testing end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: author-slo
step.action: Declare p50/p95/p99 + RPS + error-rate ceiling; owner signs off.
step.decision-gate: Refuse to run tests without signed SLO.

step.name: commit-baseline
step.action: Run baseline; commit .perf/baseline.json with git SHA + env.

step.name: pick-test-type
step.action: Pick one of {load, stress, spike, endurance, scalability}; document.

step.name: run-test
step.action: Run k6 / wrk2 / vegeta against prod-like staging; discard 60s warmup.
step.decision-gate: Reject runs from local machine or empty DB.

step.name: verdict-and-gate
step.action: Compute verdict (pass / fail / regression); attach regression_pct.
step.decision-gate: CI exits 1 on regression beyond SLO budget.
